g.text: Target State — Unified, Agentic Data & AI Platform (AFTER)
Intent API / Console — declare WHAT + SLA, not HOW
3 — Unified Data & AI Workspace · Agentic Data Science Hub
In-house Knowledge Base (RAG) — queries · intent · plans · outcomes
Product / App (ms request path · high QPS)
Zero-ETL + Federated Query (process data in place)
Apache Iceberg on MinIO — single source of truth (one copy, one format)
AI-driven ILM — routing / promotion decision (by latency SLA)
A · Object lifecycle — auto-tier hot↔cold media (stays Iceberg)
B · Local SSD cache — hot Iceberg on NVMe (ephemeral, not a copy)
C · Bounded Doris-native copy — real-time / high-QPS BI only
LLM Agents — features, code, training recovery, optimizers (Hyperopt)
Cloud testing + preview envs + domain boundaries
Data steward agents — privacy / quality / compliance
Auto-route / auto-tier — picks engine & tier (encodes ex-services-team judgment)
ML Training (now first-class on the platform)
Online / Feature Store — Cassandra / Redis / Lakebase (ML inference)
